name: grantproof
description: A free Claude Skill that rewrites founder prose into the register federal R&D grant reviewers reward — NSF SBIR/STTR, DoD, NIH, DOE, DARPA, NASA.

plugins.name: grantproof
plugins.description: Flags seven common writing-style mistakes federal R&D grant reviewers downgrade — absolute terms, marketing superlatives, product-development framing, no-prior-work claims, vague impact language, over-claimed measurement, and uncited factual claims.
